steps.title: Match subject and verb
steps.content: The subject of the blank is the reliability of the dates. The head noun is reliability, which is singular. The sentence therefore needs a finite singular present-tense verb.

steps.title: Use the finite singular form
steps.content: Choices A and C are nonfinite participle forms, so they cannot serve as the main verb. Choice B is plural or base form and does not agree with reliability. The remaining verb is singular and finite. The answer is D.
